audio_clips.text: A teenage girl is sitting in the passenger seat as her mom drives.
The girl opens the door and jumps out the car.
Lady Bird is on stage for a drama audition.
Lady Bird, wearing a pink cast, tries to shoplift a magazine by stuffing it in her skirt.
Lady Bird is sitting across her school guidance counselor.
Lady Bird peeks at another girl's test.
Lady Bird and her mom shop at Thrift Town.
Her mom picks out a lacy, peach-colored dress.
Written and directed by Greta Gerwig.
A nurse shines a light on Lady Bird's mascara-covered face.
Lady Bird is passionately kissing a boy.
Lady Bird is standing in the middle of a deserted street at night.
Lady Bird and her friend are standing in the middle of the school.
There's a montage of Lady Bird with a boy at prom, swimming, and food fighting.
Her mom tilts her head and Lady Bird leaves.
Lady Bird is sitting across a nun.
The cast of Lady Bird plays on the screen. Coming soon.
